name: Lizzies
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak raisins in the bourbon for at least an hour to plump.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs, beating well after each addition.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ground cloves into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Mix in the drained raisins, pecan halves, citron, and candied cherries by hand.
7. Scoop dough by teaspoonfuls onto buttered baking sheets.
8. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for about 15 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks before storing in airtight containers.
10. These cookies freeze well and make approximately 8-10 dozen.
